Skip to main content
Free Shipping & Returns With an RL Account:
 Sign In or Create Now  Details
20230802-free-shipping-with-account-details
Enjoy free shipping on orders made using a RalphLauren.com account. Enjoy free returns within 30 days of the order ship date. See our returns policy for details and exclusions. The free shipping offer is automatically applied at checkout after signing in to your account at RalphLauren.com or on The Ralph Lauren App. Orders typically arrive within five business days if placed by 3 PM ET (11 AM ET for orders containing customized items). Your estimated delivery date will be provided at checkout. Orders containing fragrances, rugs, or lighting and orders greater than 30 units are not eligible for Fast shipping. Regular charges will apply to all other shipping methods. Any philanthropic donations added at checkout do not count toward the minimum purchase amount. This offer has no cash value. This offer is not applicable to purchases being shipped internationally. Ralph Lauren reserves the right to end or modify any free shipping offers at any time.
Curated Mother’s Day Gifts From the World of RL:  Shop Now
Download The Ralph Lauren App.  Explore Now
20201125-black-friday-see-details
This offer is valid from November 25, 2020, at 3:15 a.m. PT to November 27, 2020, at 11:59 p.m. PT on select full-price and sale styles, as marked, at RalphLauren.com only. This offer is automatically applied at checkout. The threshold and savings apply to qualifying merchandise only; amounts paid for excluded items, shipping and handling, or taxes do not count toward the threshold amount. This offer is not valid on previously purchased merchandise, new arrivals, Collection merchandise, Double RL merchandise, Purple Label merchandise, Ralph Lauren luxury accessories and footwear, face masks, select customizable merchandise, Ralph’s Coffee product and merchandise, select home merchandise, limited-edition collections, philanthropic merchandise, books, watches and fine jewelry, fragrance, eyewear, or gift cards. This offer has no cash value. This offer can only be combined with applicable offers for free shipping. For Customer Assistance, please call 888-475-7674.

FIND IN-STORE
Select a size to view availability at 93-95 Newbury Street, Boston, MA 02116

Also Available In

  • Big & Tall
This soft sweater combines two of Polo’s most iconic design elements: a textural cable-knit motif and our signature embroidered Pony. It's made with roving cotton yarn, which offers a dimensional look. Its hand-linked neckline, in which artisans join the garment to the collar stitch by stitch, results in a seamless shape that is at once comfortable and durable.

      ★★★★★ ★★★★★ 5 out of 5 stars.
      Daryl
      · 2 months ago  

      Pairs with everything

      I recently picked up this navy blue cable knit Polo sweater and it’s easily a new favorite. Being 100% cotton, it has a great weight to it feels high-quality and substantial without being itchy like wool. The cable knit pattern is deep and well-defined, giving it a really classic, premium look. The navy color is rich and pairs perfectly with everything from jeans to chinos. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a timeless piece that’s actually comfortable for all-day wear."

© Copyright 2026 Ralph Lauren Media LLC



Do Not Sell My Personal Information

We’ve received and applied your Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal.

Do Not Sell My Personal Information

  • Your Privacy

  • Necessary Cookies

  • Sale of Personal Information through Cookies

Your Privacy

We obtain certain personal information through cookies, pixels, and other tracking technology when you visit our websites. The personal information we collect in this manner includes: Device and browsing information and other Internet activity information. Purchase or other commercial information. Demographic information. Identifiers and contact information. Inferences. By collecting this information, we learn how to best tailor our websites to our visitors and understand what products and services you might prefer. To learn more about our use of cookies, pixels, and other tracking technology by visiting our
Privacy Notice

Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the site to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy or language preferences, storing your shopping cart items, logging in or filling in forms, enabling you to log into secure areas of our website. You may disable these by changing your browser settings, but this may affect how the website functions.

Sale of Personal Information through Cookies

Under the California Consumer Privacy Act ("CCPA"), you have the right to opt-out of the sale of your personal information to third parties. Ralph Lauren does not receive compensation in exchange for sharing our customer’s personal information. However, we do utilize third party cookies, tracking technology, and other digital advertising tools that may further use the information we share with such partners for their own commercial purposes which may be considered a "sale" under the CCPA. To opt out of the sale of your personal information, click the toggle button so that it turns grey and moves to the left. Make sure you click on the Confirm My Choices button at the bottom to save your opt-out. By opting-out above, Ralph Lauren will stop sharing your personal information with the following kinds of third-party cookie and tracking technology partners:

  • Analytics Cookies
    label

    These cookies are provided by third-party online analytics services to help us improve our site by collecting and reporting information on how you use it. If you do not allow these cookies, we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

  • Personalised Advertising Cookies
    label

    These cookies are set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites based on your profile. Third-party cookies used in online advertising include cookies used for various technical operations such as frequency capping, ad affiliation, click fraud detection, market research, product improvement, debugging and any other related purposes.

Cookie List
